tagline: Salem's Garage Door Experts. Premium Doors. Precision Install.
hero_subtitle: Residential and commercial garage door sales, installation, and 24/7 emergency repair serving Salem, MA and the entire North Shore. Garaga Expert dealer with IDEA accreditation.
service_area_description: Serving Salem, Beverly, Marblehead, Danvers, Peabody, Swampscott, Gloucester, Newburyport, and communities across the North Shore.
seo_title: North Shore Garage Door Systems | Garage Doors & Repair in Salem, MA
seo_description: North Shore Garage Door Systems — premium garage door sales, installation, and 24/7 repair in Salem, MA. Garaga Expert dealer. IDEA accredited. Serving the entire North Shore.
about_heading: The North Shore's Premier Garage Door Company
services_subtitle: From premium residential doors to high-speed commercial systems — expert installation, repair, and 24/7 emergency service across the North Shore.
reviews_subtitle: Homeowners and businesses count on us for premium garage doors, expert installation, and reliable service.
cta_heading: Need a new garage door or emergency repair?
cta_subtitle: Visit our Salem showroom, call 24/7 for emergencies, or book a free consultation online.
footer_description: Premium garage door sales, installation, and 24/7 repair serving Salem and the North Shore. Garaga Expert dealer. IDEA accredited. BBB A+ rated.

services_featured.name: Residential Garage Doors
services_featured.description: Garaga, Clopay, Amarr, Wayne Dalton, and more — with five insulation levels, design customization, and expert installation. Visit our Salem showroom.

services_secondary.name: Garage Door Repair & Service
services_secondary.description: Broken springs, damaged panels, off-track doors, and worn cables. Our trained technicians respond fast with 24-hour emergency availability.

services_accent.name: Commercial Door Systems
services_accent.description: Sectional doors, rolling steel doors, high-speed doors, dock equipment, and gate operators for businesses across the North Shore.

services_wide.name: LiftMaster Openers
services_wide.description: ProVantage-certified LiftMaster dealer. Belt drive, chain drive, and wall-mount openers with smart-home connectivity and battery backup.

about_features.title: Garaga Expert & IDEA Accredited
about_features.description: One of the few IDEA-accredited door dealers on the North Shore. Certified Garaga Expert with factory training and top-tier product access.

about_features.title: Full Showroom in Salem
about_features.description: Visit our showroom at 45 Mason St to see doors, openers, and hardware in person. Get hands-on help choosing the right door for your home.

about_features.title: 24/7 Emergency Service
about_features.description: Garage door emergencies can't wait until Monday. Our team is available around the clock for urgent repairs across the North Shore.

reviews.name: Mark
reviews.text: The motors and doors were replaced on my two garages and they never looked or sounded more quiet. The staff was highly professional and very polite.

reviews.name: Homeowner
reviews.text: Installer came early and was done in about 2 hours. Everything was perfect. Would hire again for sure. Top-notch quality and service.

reviews.name: Thomas
reviews.text: Professional from start to finish. LiftMaster recommended them because of their ProVantage status. Would definitely recommend to anyone.
